hero.eyebrow: Established Indian Manufacturer & Med-Tech Integration Partner
hero.title: India's Most Accountable Medical Equipment Partnership
hero.description: PEIC manufactures high-pressure sterilization systems at our Mumbai facility and represents 14 leading global and domestic medical equipment brands across India: AngioDynamics, Steris, Richard Wolf, Samsung, and many more. One technical team. Specification through long-term lifecycle support.

hero_panel.title: OEM manufacturer with direct service accountability
hero_panel.description: Long manufacturing heritage, 14 integrated global and domestic brands, and a single post-sale service relationship. All under 1 partner.

specs.label: Scope
specs.value: Manufactured Equipment + 14 Global and Domestic Brands

capabilities.label: Core Capabilities
capabilities.title: Two Pillars of Healthcare Technology Excellence

cards.title: Indigenous Manufacturing
cards.description: Engineering world-class Sterilization Systems and CSSD infrastructure built to global standards.

cards.title: Global & Domestic Distribution
cards.description: Authorized technical integration partner for 14 medical brands across India.

capabilities.description: PEIC is the only partner in India that brings an OEM manufacturer's technical discipline to both its own sterilization systems and the global medical brands it represents. Fewer vendor handoffs. Clearer service ownership. Equipment decisions backed by engineering judgment.

workflow.label: Engineering Discipline
workflow.title: A single technical chain from specification to uptime.
workflow.description: Every project is treated as a lifecycle system: requirement mapping, product selection, installation, validation, training, spare parts, and service accountability.

steps.title: Clinical Requirement
steps.description: Map departments, load, compliance and procurement constraints.

steps.title: Equipment Architecture
steps.description: Manufactured and partner systems configured as one operating portfolio.

steps.title: Commissioning
steps.description: Installation, calibration, training and documentation for biomedical teams.

steps.title: Lifecycle Support
steps.description: AMC, CMC, spares, refurbishing and response planning after deployment.

advantage.label: Why PEIC
advantage.title: Built for procurement scrutiny
advantage.description: For direct outreach, tenders, service planning, and multi-department purchases, PEIC presents the credibility of an established manufacturer with the reach of an authorized med-tech integration partner.

cta.label: Procurement Conversation
cta.title: Need a credible equipment partner for an active purchase?
cta.description: Share the department, city, timeline, and products required. PEIC will route the enquiry to the right commercial or technical team.
